title: Fix generated CLI cache and closeout archive duplicate-key bugs

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Fix #1247 and #1248 directly on master: make generated CLI fingerprint cache writes retry-safe on Windows and remove case-variant duplicate keys from generated/checked-in Planning closeout evidence.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep the fixes bounded to launcher cache writing, Planning closeout execution-summary canonicalization, regression tests, and duplicate archive evidence cleanup.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact retry helper shape, focused regression tests, and JSON-aware archive cleanup mechanics.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct fix requires changing the generated CLI refresh model, broad Planning schema changes, or rewriting historical archive semantics beyond duplicate-key cleanup.
canonical_core.next_action: Validate the implemented cache retry, closeout canonicalization, duplicate-key scan, and workspace/planning checks.
proof_expectations: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: #1247 has retry-safe generated CLI fingerprint cache replacement with regression coverage.
#1248 has canonical Planning execution-summary key handling, generated closeout regressions, and no checked-in case-variant archive duplicate keys.
